content_sections.heading: HPPSC Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The Himachal Pradesh Public Service Commission (HPPSC) Recruitment 2026 notification released for 37 posts of Assistant Professor. Candidates with MS, MS/MD Can Apply Online. The Online application process for HPPSC Recruitment 2026 has started on 06-06-2026 and will remain open until 04-07-2026. The candidate shall apply online through HPPSC website, hppsc.hp.gov.in/.

content_sections.heading: HPPSC Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Download
content_sections.text: The HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF has been released on at hppsc.hp.gov.in/. Check the complete job details, vacancy, age limit, application fee, selection process and how to apply from the article. You can Check all Latest Sarkari Result Updates of All Central Government Jobs and State Government Jobs. HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Name of the Post : HPPSC Assistant Professor Online Form 2026 Post Date : 09-06-2026 Total Vacancy : 37 Posts Brief Information: The Himachal Pradesh Public Service Commission (HPPSC) has announced a notification for the recruitment of Assistant Professor Vacancy. Eligible Candidates who are interested in the vacancy details & completed all eligibility criteria can read the notification & Apply.

content_sections.heading: HPPSC Recruitment 2026 Notification Overview
content_sections.text: The Himachal Pradesh Public Service Commission (HPPSC) has officially released a recruitment notification for Assistant Professor. For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

rows.himachal_pradesh_public_service_commissi: Application Fee A uniform fee shall be charged from all the candidates, irrespective of their category or gender: Rs 600
HPPSC Recruitment 2026 Important Dates Starting Date for Apply Online: 06-06-2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 04-07-2026
HPPSC Recruitment 2026 Age Limit (01-01-2026) Maximum Age Limit: 45 years and below Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

Eligibility Criteria Assistant Professor (General Surgery): A recognized medical qualification included in the first or second Schedule or Part-II of the third Schedule (other than Licentiate qualifications) to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956, now National Medical Commission Act, 2019. Holders of Educational Qualification included in Part-II of the third Schedule should also fulfil the conditions stipulated in sub-section (3) of Section 13 of Indian Medical Council Act,1956 now National Medical Commission Act, 2019. A post-graduate degree in the concerned speciality mentioned in Part-A of Annexure-II or its equivalent qualifications. At least 3 years teaching experience as Lecturer/Registrar/Demonstrator/Resident after doing post-graduation in the concerned speciality in any recognized Medical College. M.S. (Surgery/ Gen. Surgery) F.R.C.E. Speciality Board of Surgery (U.S.A.). Assistant Professor (Dermatology): A recognized medical qualification included in the first or second Schedule or Part-II of the third Schedule (other than Licentiate qualifications) to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956, now National Medical Commission Act, 2019. Holders of Educational Qualification included in Part-II of the third Schedule should also fulfil the conditions stipulated in sub-section (3) of Section-13 of Indian Medical Council Act, 1956, now National Medical Commission Act, 2019. A postgraduate degree in the concerned speciality mentioned in Part-A of Annexure-II or its equivalent qualifications. Atleast 3 years teaching experience as Lecturer/ Registrar/ Demonstrator/ Resident after doing post-graduation in the concerned speciality in any recognised Medical College. MD (Dermatology and Venereology)/ MD (Medicine) with D.V.D
Pay Scale Assistant Professor: Rs.37400-67000 + (G.P. 8900) Assistant Professor (Dermatology, Forensic Medicine ): Pay Band Level - 30 (Rs. 129700 - 214300)
HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details

rows.col_2: 09 posts (UR=7, UR ExSM of HP=01 & OBC of HP=01)
05 posts (UR=3 & UR ExSM of HP=01 & SC of HP=01)

rows.himachal_pradesh_public_service_commissi: Assistant Professor (Community Medicine or Social and Preventive Medicine)
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Notification Before Apply Online

content_sections.heading: HPPSC Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: Starting Date for Apply Online: 06-06-2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 04-07-2026

content_sections.heading: HPPSC Recruitment 2026 Age Limit (01-01-2026)
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years and below Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 is 04 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available under HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 37 Assistant Professor vacancies have been announced across various medical specialties.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: All candidates, irrespective of category or gender, are required to pay a uniform application fee of Rs. 600.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates should be 45 years of age or below as on 01 January 2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What educational qualification is required for HPPSC Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a recognized medical qualification along with the required postgraduate degree in the relevant specialty and prescribed teaching experience as mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The pay scale is Rs. 37,400–67,000 with Grade Pay Rs. 8,900, while some posts are offered under Pay Level-30 (Rs. 1,29,700–2,14,300).

faq.question: Q7. When did the online application process begin for HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process started on 06 June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Which specialties are included in HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Vacancies are available in specialties including General Surgery, Dermatology, Orthopaedics, General Medicine, Anaesthesia, Biochemistry, ENT, Ophthalmology, Forensic Medicine, Obstetrics & Gynaecology, and Community Medicine.
